note: Inventory of the canonical (0001_init.up.sql) schema at the pinned base. 48 CREATE TABLE + 1 VIEW. Classification per tenant-schema contract §14. tenants (root) and tenant_write_fences (security meta) are NEW to-be-created tables and are NOT part of the canonical 48; see classification.md.

unique_constraints.name: idx_bot_history_messages_turn_seq_unique
unique_constraints.partial: turn_id IS NOT NULL AND turn_message_seq IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: idx_bot_history_messages_visible_session_order
indexes.partial:
turn_visible = true
    AND turn_id IS NOT NULL
    AND turn_position IS NOT NULL
    AND turn_message_seq IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: idx_bot_history_messages_visible_session_source_order
indexes.partial:
turn_visible = true
    AND source_message_id IS NOT NULL
    AND turn_id IS NOT NULL
    AND turn_position IS NOT NULL
    AND turn_message_seq IS NOT NULL

unique_constraints.name: idx_session_events_dedup
unique_constraints.partial: external_message_id IS NOT NULL AND external_message_id != ''

tables.name: channel_identity_bind_codes
tables.classification_note: 待确认: present in canonical 0001 but DROPPED by incremental 0080_remove_channel_identity_binding.up.sql; absent from final full-apply state. Disposition owner must decide keep-vs-drop before tenantizing.

views.name: bot_visible_history_messages
views.note: Projects bot_id/session_id/sender_* (bot-scope) and filters turn_visible/turn_id/turn_position/turn_message_seq; no tenant column exists yet. Per contract §5.4 the view must project/enforce tenant_id once bot_history_messages is tenantized; it must not become a read bypass of tenant scope.
